steps.title: Identify the population represented by the sample
steps.content:
The sample consists only of Gala apples, so any inference about weight applies specifically to that group, not to all apples in the orchard.
Therefore we can estimate the proportion of Gala apples weighing more than 5 ounces from the sample proportion of 25%.

steps.title: Evaluate answer choices
steps.content:
The matching choice states that approximately 25% of all Gala apples in the orchard weigh more than 5 ounces, which matches the inference from the sample.
The other choices refer to all apples or average weight, which the sample does not support.
D is correct.
